metaBuilds.title: Crit Drain
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for lifesteal sustain, online around minute 24 — about 515 HP drained back over a 10s fight in the sim.

metaBuilds.title: Crit Burst
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 711 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 7% of our best core on one-combo burst. The winrate is earned, not luck.

metaBuilds.title: On-Hit Drain
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for lifesteal sustain, online around minute 24 — about 475 HP drained back over a 10s fight in the sim.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Khaimera's main threat is Cull; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 27% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Boris deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 17% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Serath's main threat is Chastise; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 28% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Kallari's main threat is Guillotine; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 28% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Respect their early kill threat; the exchange levels out later, so trade patiently and scale. Rampage deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 17% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Kwang ramps on auto-attacks — pressure them before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 23% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

laneSteer.provenance: “Storm of Salvation” ⇒ on-hit; the sim can’t model this augment — steered by the declared playstyle + field evidence — field jungle 51.5% over 284,229 games, magnitude not simulated.
